task_completion.description: Verify a workout session is created for today's date and linked to the '5x5 Beginner' routine.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a workout session overview or log page showing the current date and explicitly mentioning the routine '5x5 Beginner'.

task_completion.description: Verify the session includes the required note and an impression.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the exact text 'Solid squat session, nearly hit all reps' in the session notes section, along with a selected impression (e.g., a highlighted emoji, face, or rating) on the session page.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Squats' is added as an exercise to the workout session.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the exercise 'Squats' listed in the workout session details or log.

task_completion.description: Verify the first set for Squats is logged with 100 kg and 5 reps.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a logged set entry under Squats showing a weight of 100 (or 100.0) kg and 5 reps.

task_completion.description: Verify the second set for Squats is logged with 100 kg and 5 reps.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a second logged set entry under Squats showing a weight of 100 (or 100.0) kg and 5 reps.

task_completion.description: Verify the third set for Squats is logged with 100 kg and 4 reps.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a third logged set entry under Squats showing a weight of 100 (or 100.0) kg and 4 reps.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to interact with the wger application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard web browser UI elements (address bar, tabs) rather than a terminal or API testing tool.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the genuine wger interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the wger fitness manager interface and the URL http://localhost in the address bar, ensuring it is not a text editor or mock page.

integrity.description: Verify the session data was actually saved and not just typed into unsaved input fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a saved session view, confirmation messages, or a completed log table rather than just filled-out form fields without submission.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected routine name is '5x5 Beginner'. The expected exercise is 'Squats'. The expected notes are exactly 'Solid squat session, nearly hit all reps'. The expected weights are 100.0 kg for all three sets. The expected reps are 5 for Set 1, 5 for Set 2, and 4 for Set 3.
